✉️ A Special Delivery — Just For You, Dad

✨ Click the envelope to open

✨ Click the card to open it

🌸 Like cherry blossoms — beautiful, fleeting, unforgettable

For My Dad 💗

Dad, there are no words grand enough to hold everything you mean to me. You have been my foundation — steady, strong, and always present when the ground felt uncertain beneath my feet. Every lesson you've offered, whether spoken plainly or quietly lived by example, has shaped the person I am in ways I'm still discovering. The way you love without condition, give without hesitation, and show up before you're even asked — that is the kind of person I strive to be every single day. Your sacrifices were never invisible to me. Your patience was never lost on me. Your kindness left a permanent mark on my heart that no amount of time could ever fade. And your love? It is the very reason I understand what it means to feel truly safe and truly seen in this world. You have carried so much so quietly, and with such grace — and I want you to know that I see it, I feel it, and I am endlessly grateful for every bit of it. Thank you for being my dad, my greatest example, and the quiet constant in every chapter of my life. I love you more than any letter, any song, or any cherry blossom in full bloom could ever express. 🌸

— Forever your child, with all my love 💌
